# tf_tools

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Module extension for tool download (terraform, tflint, terraform-docs).

```starlark
tf_tools = use_extension("@rules_tf2//tf2:extensions.bzl", "tf_tools")
tf_tools.from_versions_json(versions_file = "path/to/versions.json")
use_repo(tf_tools, "tf_tool_registry", "tflint_plugin_registry")
```

See [Module Extensions Overview](README.md) for more information.
